steps.title: Compare all three foods
steps.content: The student wants to identify which food has the highest magnesium content among peanuts, almonds, and chia seeds. The notes list 49 mg/oz for peanuts, 80 mg/oz for almonds, and 150 mg/oz for chia seeds.

steps.title: Reject partial comparisons
steps.content: Choice A compares almonds only with peanuts, leaving out chia seeds. Choice C says magnesium is present in all three foods but gives no highest amount. Choice D gives only the peanut value and background about magnesium's role. The answer is B.
